function.description: All functional transactions and error transitions observed

cycle.description: Handshake, stall, and ordering behaviors covered

coverage_goals.functional: Legacy alias: function + cycle must both close

limitations.rtl_observed_coverage: Functional bins are not covered until a passing scoreboard row with real rtl_observed signals hits them: latency_alu_instr_lt_min, latency_fetch_accept_lt_min, latency_load_store_instr_lt_min
limitations.line: SSOT requests line/code coverage, but coverage.info has no DA records.
limitations.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but coverage.info has no BRDA/BRF records for this tool flow.

static_universe_not_instrumented.branch: SSOT requests branch coverage, but coverage.info has no BRDA/BRF records for this tool flow.
